import json
with open\('/Users/yhm/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/Python-2026-03-03-134333.ips', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

parts = content.split\('\\n', 1\)
data = json.loads\(parts[1]\)

# Also check the first \(main\) thread
threads = data.get\("threads", []\)
print\("=== Main Thread \(thread 0\) ==="\)
mt = threads[0]
print\("thread id:", mt.get\("id"\), "queue:", mt.get\("queue"\)\)
frames = mt.get\("frames", []\)
print\("Stack \(frames 0-20\):"\)
for i, frame in enumerate\(frames[:20]\):
    sym = frame.get\("symbol", "\(unknown\)"\)
    loc = frame.get\("symbolLocation", "?"\)
    print\(f"  [{i}] {sym}+{loc}"\)

print\(\)
print\("=== All thread IDs ==="\)
for t in threads:
    print\(f"  id={t.get\('id'\)} triggered={t.get\('triggered',False\)} name={t.get\('name',''\)}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
with open\('/Users/yhm/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/Python-2026-03-03-134333.ips', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

parts = content.split\('\\n', 1\)
meta = json.loads\(parts[0]\)
data = json.loads\(parts[1]\)

# Calculate the time between launch and crash
launch = data.get\("procLaunch"\)
capture = data.get\("captureTime"\)
print\(f"Process launched: {launch}"\)
print\(f"Crash captured:   {capture}"\)

from datetime import datetime
fmt = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f %z"
try:
    t_launch = datetime.strptime\(launch.strip\(\), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f %z"\)
    t_crash  = datetime.strptime\(capture.strip\(\), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f %z"\)
    delta = t_crash - t_launch
    print\(f"Time to crash: {delta.total_seconds\(\):.1f} seconds"\)
except Exception as e:
    print\("Parse error:", e\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 -c "
import re
with open\('/Users/yhm/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-code/cli.js', 'r', errors='replace'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Search for the yH function definition and its context
matches = [\(m.start\(\), m.group\(\)\) for m in re.finditer\(r'function yH\\\(\\\)', content\)]
for start, match in matches[:5]:
    print\('=== yH\(\) at', start, '==='\)
    print\(content[max\(0,start-50\):start+500]\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1 || true)

Bash(python3 -c "
import re
with open\('/Users/yhm/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-code/cli.js', 'r', errors='replace'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Search for H_7 definition - this is the darwin keychain handler
matches = [\(m.start\(\), m.group\(\)\) for m in re.finditer\(r'H_7\\b', content\)]
print\('H_7 appears', len\(matches\), 'times'\)
# Show around each
for start, match in matches[:8]:
    snippet = content[max\(0,start-100\):start+200]
    print\('=== H_7 at offset', start, '==='\)
    print\(snippet\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1 || true)

Bash(python3 -c "
import re
with open\('/Users/yhm/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-code/cli.js', 'r', errors='replace'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find OAUTH_FILE_SUFFIX and o4\(\) function
for pattern, label in [
    \(r'OAUTH_FILE_SUFFIX', 'OAUTH_FILE_SUFFIX'\),
    \(r'function o4\\\(\\\)', 'o4\(\) function'\),
]:
    matches = list\(re.finditer\(pattern, content\)\)
    print\(f'{label}: {len\(matches\)} matches'\)
    for m in matches[:3]:
        print\('  offset', m.start\(\), ':', content[m.start\(\):m.start\(\)+300]\)
        print\(\)
" 2>&1 || true)

Bash(python3 -c "
import re
with open\('/Users/yhm/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-code/cli.js', 'r', errors='replace'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find the _\\$7 function \(with dollar sign\) - the darwin keychain wrapper
# It combines keychain + plaintext fallback
matches = list\(re.finditer\(r'function \\$_7', content\)\)
print\(f'function \\$_7: {len\(matches\)} matches'\)
for m in matches[:3]:
    print\('=== \\$_7 at', m.start\(\), '==='\)
    print\(content[m.start\(\):m.start\(\)+600]\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1 || true)
